title: Sealapack Flavour Lock Roasting Bags, Pack Of 12, Brown
features: PERFECT ROAST: Sealapack Roasting bags are suitable for cooking meat, fish and vegetables. Using these bags will retain the moisture and flavour of the food whilst keeping your roasting tray and oven clean.
CRISP & TASTY: The roasting bag allows the meat to cook exactly the same without the mess, ensuring the skin is evenly brown and crisp, no need for basting the meat during cooking.
OVEN & MICROWAVE: The roasting bags are suitable to use in either the oven or for quicker,cleaner cooking, the bags can be used in the microwave
EXTRA FLAVOUR: Add any spices or herbs to the bag, shake to coat the bag, add the meat and roast for the required cooking time
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 12 BAGS. EACH BAG 25 x 28cm
description: Sealapack Roasting bags are suitable for cooking meat, fish and vegetables. Using these bags will retain the moisture and flavour of the food whilst keeping your roasting tray and oven clean. The roasting bag allows the meat to cook exactly the same without the mess, ensuring the skin is evenly brown and crisp, no need for basting the meat during cooking. The roasting bags are suitable to use in either the oven or for quicker, cleaniner cooking, the bags can be used in the microwave. Add any spices or herbs to the bag, shake to coat the bag, add the meat and roast for the required cooking time. Pack of 12 bags each 25 x 28cm
